title: Lab meeting 2026-04-15: my notes
description: Lab meeting recap, taken from my seat.

entries.title: 2026-04-15: meeting notes
entries.content:
Lab meeting recap, taken from my seat.

Walk-throughs:
- alex: transformation efficiency update. Heat-shock time matters more than I thought (38 vs 40 min produced a 2-fold colony drop in the 2026-04 batch).
- Me: chapter 2 figure brainstorm. Got useful pushback on the heatmap color scale (use viridis, not the default red/green which is colorblind-unfriendly).

Group decisions:
- Standardize on the public DemoCheck PCR protocol for all integration checks (was previously split between two slightly different copies)
- New lab convention: every PCR has a no-template control on the same plate, no exceptions
- The Lab Head will write a 1-page bench-safety refresher and post it in the lab links section

What I want to remember for me:
The colorblind point also applies to my pYES-vs-pDEMO figure. Re-render with viridis before the next dissertation committee check-in.
